title: ウマ娘ちゃんへの愛は永遠です！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come across Agnes Digital's student handbook
while on a stroll, and look around for where she
could have gone.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! I h-have everything in order—it's perfect. With this, I'm ready to cheer on my Umamusume idols!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Time to unleash my ultimate fan chant!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eeek?! Ow...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyagghgh?! Nononono! Did I just bump into you?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? No, not at all! I got caught on a tree
branch, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, o-okay. Stay safe...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh... I think I got a little too carried away in this beautiful Horsegirl paradise.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like, what if she'd actually gotten hurt because of
me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gyaagh! I could never live with myself! I would
have to abandon my otaku life!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! Shut the hell up already! I'm trying to write some new code over—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohmygooosh! Shakur, you're way too cool! Wild
and cool!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I said shut it! You keep fidgeting and flailing
around... Would it kill you to think to yourself
quietly?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Meep! Y-you heard me?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch. What's the deal, anyway? You were rambling
about abandoning your otaku stuff.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you can throw away your passions that easily... I
guess they didn't mean that much to you after all,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp. I... I could never! Simping is my life!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: B-but, I feel like I should get my act together. I mean, this is the Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're such a pain. No one cares as long as you
stay in your lane and don't cause any issues.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Skills are skills. The only difference between data
hacking and data cracking is how those skills are
used.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So you mean like... like setting boundaries
between my racing and my fangirling?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying that watching someone'll show you
when to strike, and thinking like 'em will show you
where.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The people who can do both—they're the real
ones.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait! I see... I'm starting to get it now, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So, if I've got this right, the most important thing is to consider who I'm using my skills for!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When I'm cheering on my beloved Umas as a fan,
I'll shout out my love at the very top of my lungs!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And it's important use that knowledge to
understand how my fans feel so I can prepare
myself better for races!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Thanks a lot, Shakur! I'll love my Umas
for as long as I live!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, great. Now can it and leave me alone
already.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna cheer for you with my ultimate fan
chants at your winning concerts too, Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Mragh?! Why me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry! I promise I'll do my best to not
cause a scene! I stake my honor as an otaku on it!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: NO ONE ASKED YOU TO DO THAT!
